topic: My wife has started reading aloud in her sleep from a book that does not exist
title: My Wife Reads Aloud in Her Sleep. A Different Page Each Night. The Book Does Not Exist. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My wife reads aloud in her sleep. A different page each night. No book.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone on a bedside table with an audio recording app open, dim moonlight on the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Married four years. Sound sleeper. Never spoke in her sleep before.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a darkened bedroom at night with two pillows on a bed, the comforter pulled up, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She begins around three AM. Goes for ten minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bedside alarm clock showing three AM in red numerals, dim ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First night was in January. Recorded her on my phone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone face down on a sheet beside a sleeping figure, only the phone and corner of pillow visible, dim moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Played it back at breakfast. She did not recognize her voice.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen playing back a voice recording on a kitchen counter, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Recording was clear. Articulate. Reading prose she has never written.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of audio waveforms on a phone screen during playback, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a yellow legal pad with handwritten transcribed text, a pen across the page, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Different page numbers every night. Page seven. Page nineteen. Page two hundred forty four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a notepad with handwritten page numbers and partial paragraphs of transcribed text, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The story is continuous. She is reading a novel in order. Different pages, same book.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small home office desk covered with transcribed pages organized chronologically, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week page two seventy four ended mid sentence. The next night she finished the sentence.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two transcribed pages side by side with the same sentence completed across them, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone face down in a drawer beside a charging cable, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She read my name aloud last Friday. She has never read a character name before.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a transcribed page with one word circled in red marker, the word obscured by a thumb, vertical 9:16 framing
